companies.name: SENSUM
companies.shortDescription: Sensum develops and manufactures automatic visual inspection machines and computer vision systems for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical companies. The company focuses on 100% quality inspection and sorting of tablets, capsules, transparent capsules and softgels, as well as counting and bottle filling. Sensum also provides lifting, dedusting and polishing equipment for solid dosage forms and process analytical technology systems for automated particle size and shape analysis in fluid bed and related processes. Its machines use computer vision, image processing and, more recently, deep learning to classify products and separate defective from acceptable units. Sensum’s solutions are used in production and R&D environments for real-time monitoring, quality assurance and process optimization. || Company in Ljubljana, Slovenia | Slovenian company | Sensum develops and produces automatic visual inspection machines and particle analysis systems for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical firms. | Sensum develops and manufactures automatic visual inspection machines and computer vision systems for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical companies. The company focuses on 100% quality inspection and sorting of tablets, capsules, transparent capsules and softgels, as well as counting and bottle filling. Sensum also provides lifting, dedusting and polishing equipment for solid dosage forms and process analytical technology systems for automated particle size and shape analysis in fluid bed and related processes. Its machines use computer vision, image processing and, more recently, deep learning to classify products and separate defective from acceptable units. Sensum’s solutions are used in production and R&D environments for real-time monitoring, quality assurance and process optimization. | Our consistent innovation made us one of the leading manufacturers of machines for 100% automatic visual inspection of pharmaceutical products. We do business worldwide and have been recognized by many leading multinational pharmaceutical companies (Pfizer, Novartis, Roche, Bayer, Eli Lilly, Teva, etc.) as the technology leader and a preferred supplier of machines for automatic inspection. In our portfolio are high and mid capacity solutions for 100 % quality inspection of tablets, capsules, transparent capsules and softgels and in-line PAT solution for real-time visual monitoring of pharmaceutical processes. | Other research and experimental development on natural sciences and engineering

companies.name: SAKI
companies.shortDescription:
Saki Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells inspection equipment. The Company produces automated optical and X-ray inspection system for printed circuit board assemblies, semiconductor package, or power module. Saki conducts business worldwide. || Saki is a manufacturer of automated electronic assembly inspection equipment specializing in printed circuit boards, and power modules. | Global top brand supplier for  SPI, AOI and AXI. 

Since its establishment in 1994, Saki Corporation has, in a short period of time, acquired a worldwide position in the field of automatic visual-inspection equipment for electronic parts mounting processes utilize robotic vision technology. The Company has achieved this important goal guided by the motto embodied in its corporate principle — “Challenging the creation of new value.”

The Company customer satisfaction, product quality, and employee satisfaction, all high priorities and has incorporated these into its comprehensive management plan. Incorporating the spirit of these priorities into its strategies for worldwide expansion, Saki has continued to maintain stable growth over the long term with an aim to securing the top position in the global market for its brand name products.

In the 21st century, the robotics industry will play a key role in the development of the global economy. Saki Corporation will endeavor to promote the development of this new industry designed for a new age and in achieving this goal increase its contribution to societies around the world. | Saki Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells inspection equipment. The Company produces automated optical and X-ray inspection system for printed circuit board assemblies, semiconductor package, or power module. Saki conducts business worldwide. | Manufacturer of automated optical inspection system, etc.

companies.name: HD Vision Systems
companies.shortDescription:
HD Vision Systems supports manufacturing companies in all matters relating to industrial image processing based on light field technology and deep learning. This means we offer our partners quick and easy access to process automation and quality control.

Whether it is quality inspection or handling of workpieces: our unique combination of hardware and software allows the necessary image information to be read from the generated data. Paired with artificial intelligence and deep learning, this results in powerful image processing solutions for industry.

User-friendliness is a key concern for us: users can operate the associated software easily and intuitively without any prior knowledge. companies.name: Sweeper
companies.shortDescription: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management. || SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. | SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management.

companies.name: MERASYS
companies.shortDescription:
We are a company leader in artificial intelligence applied to industrial process, Smart Grids, Smart Cities and health. We combine the principles of artificial neural networks with sophisticated sensors, cutting-edge electronics, and next-generation software for high-performance installations and technological platforms.

We have a high experience and background in these technologies: 
 
- In automotive industry: online automated inspection system based on artificial vision and artificial neural networks for defects detection on cars bodies. We are a technology partner of the main automotive OEMs such as the PSA Group and the RENAULT NISSAN MITSUBISHI Alliance. We have been accredited as a TIER1 supplier for both OEMs after 2015.

- In Smart Grids, developing technologies to realise predictive electrical consumption (production and consumption prediction) 

- Developing platforms RTRM (Real Time Remote Monitoring) for monitor marine water quality parameters, meteorological conditions in a seafood farming structure, the water quality in reservoirs. 

Grupo ITERA is a business group established in 2003 and made up of Enxenia S.L., Itera Técnica S.L., Installations Techniques du Detroit (a subsidiary based in Morocco) and Ingeniería y control Merasys S.L. (which was born as a result of our participation in the BFAuto acceleration program).
Our staff consists of a team specialised in the development of turnkey projects, as well as an administrative team. We have registered trademarks such as HYMANN-GUSTAVSSON, focused on mechanical components for the treatment of viscous fluids, or MERASYS, by which we distribute the machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies.
We also have patents for electromechanical automation equipment and non-contact inspection technologies. || We are a company leader in artificial intelligence applied to industrial process, Smart Grids, Smart Cities and health. companies.name: Merlicon Robotics
companies.shortDescription:
Merlicon is a deep-tech company, driving innovation in robotics and machine vision. We deliver turnkey solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of industries worldwide.

We specialize in robotics solutions, including end-of-line palletizing, depalletizing, robotic assembly, and bin-picking, delivering precise and efficient automation.

In machine vision, we specialize in high-performance quality control (inspection), measurement, deep learning, and robot-vision systems, focused on enabling 100% error-free production.

With dedicated R&D at the Eindhoven High Tech Campus AI Innovation Center and the Istanbul Teknopark Deep-Tech Center, we engineer proprietary software and systems that meet the highest industry standards. || Merlicon is a deep-tech company, driving innovation in robotics and machine vision. We deliver turnkey solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of industries worldwide.

We specialize in robotics solutions, including end-of-line palletizing, depalletizing, robotic assembly, and bin-picking, delivering precise and efficient automation.

In machine vision, we specialize in high-performance quality control (inspection), measurement, deep learning, and robot-vision systems, focused on enabling 100% error-free production.

With dedicated R&D at the Eindhoven High Tech Campus AI Innovation Center and the Istanbul Teknopark Deep-Tech Center, we engineer proprietary software and systems that meet the highest industry standards.

companies.name: GM Tech
companies.shortDescription: GMS Technology aims to provide the best technology for image processing with neural networks. The demand for automated quality inspection systems based on image analysis has grown in many industries for years now. Only recently, these systems have started to rely on artificial intelligence to inspect parts with variable appearance and unpredictable defects. The adoption of artificial intelligence, more precisely deep learning technology has increased the demand for high-powered PCs able to ensure fast training and processing of deep learning algorithms on inspected images. GMS Technology offers rugged and industrial PCs fully tested and optimized with the main deep learning software products available in the market. || GMS Technology aims to provide the best technology for image processing with neural networks. The demand for automated quality inspection systems based on image analysis has grown in many industries for years now. Only recently, these systems have started to rely on artificial intelligence to inspect parts with variable appearance and unpredictable defects. The adoption of artificial intelligence, more precisely deep learning technology has increased the demand for high-powered PCs able to ensure fast training and processing of deep learning algorithms on inspected images. GMS Technology offers rugged and industrial PCs fully tested and optimized with the main deep learning software products available in the market.

companies.name: Revtech Systems
companies.shortDescription:
Revtech Systems integrates industrial robotics, automation, and machine vision and AI systems for manufacturing operations. The company designs and implements custom robotic cells, including welding, painting, machining load/unload, pick and place, inspection, and palletizing applications. It works with industrial, collaborative, and mobile robots and integrates vision systems in 1D, 2D, and 3D to guide robots and inspect products. Revtech Systems also provides software, data, and AI capabilities to optimize production processes and support industry 4.0 initiatives. Its services include pre-engineering, turnkey automation projects, maintenance and technical support, and training for customer teams across multiple manufacturing sectors. || Notre équipe compte plusieurs années d’expérience en robotique. La mission de Revtech Systèmes est d’aider les entreprises manufacturières dans l’automatisation et la robotisation de leurs procédés. Que ce soit pour une solution clef en main, pour du service technique sur des cellules robotiques existantes ou pour de l’accompagnement dans vos développements robotique, nous sommes là pour vous!

Revtech Systems’ team has many years of experience in robotics and automation. Our goal is to help manufacturing companies in their automation and robotics projects, keeping them ahead of competition in their respective markets. Whether it is for a robotic turnkey solution, for technical support on existing robots or for assistance in your robotic projects, we are here to help!
